title: 12891_Layer_by_Layer_Uncovering_Hidden_Representations_in_Language_Models
positive_examples: Improved performance on a variety of downstream tasks through better understanding of intermediate-layer representations.
Potential for enhanced model interpretability and robustness.
negative_examples: Amplification of latent biases in model representations.
Risk of reinforcing biases or leading to unintended disparities in real-world applications.
